_comment: Example plugins/saml/conf/settings.json for the Tinyland Caldera deployment. The real file is rendered by tofu (blahaj/tofu/stacks/caldera/secrets.tf) from SOPS-encrypted vars and mounted at /usr/src/app/plugins/saml/conf/settings.json. Use this as a reference for the shape — never check in real keys.

singleLogoutService._comment: Caldera SAML plugin does not support SLO. Leave empty.

sp.x509cert: <SP signing public cert, PEM with BEGIN/END headers stripped>
sp.privateKey: <SP signing private key, PEM with BEGIN/END headers stripped>

idp.x509cert: <IdP signing public cert, PEM with BEGIN/END headers stripped>

security._comment: Tuned for production-shape Shibboleth IdP 5.2. SimpleSAMLphp can be more permissive in lab; tighten when swapping to Shibboleth in Phase 4.
